title: Add stable public screenshots and onboarding documentation

acceptance_criteria.text: Provide a stable, repeatable screenshot process: a deterministic demo-state generator plus a headless capture script, documented so the images can be regenerated consistently.
Refresh the public screenshots to show the multi-track product (resolving the release-readiness audit follow-up) and the newer views, and reference them from the README.
Add onboarding documentation: an end-user getting-started guide and a contributor onboarding guide.
Add an in-app first-run onboarding walkthrough, shown once on a fresh install and replayable from Preferences.
